en: Ice squares anyone? Take a napkin? Alright. Monica! Monica! Monica, your guests are turning
into jerky, okay? Good! I'm definitely comfortable. Hey, hey, hey! Get in line, buddy! I was next!
Mr. Trigger! Hey, you said there was a party. Oh, yeah! Well, hey, welcome to our sauna!
ja: パーティーがあるって聞いたんだけど。

en: Is it hot? My body always stays cool. Probably because I have so much skin. Hey, cheese!
ja: たぶん皮膚が多いからだね。
vi: Co le vi toi nhieu da qua.

en: Alright, alright, here's the chance. Monica, give him cash. Rachel, give him your earrings.
ja: レイチェル、現金を渡して。イヤリングを渡して。
zhTW: 給他現金，Rachel給他你的耳環。
vi: Dua tien mat di, Rachel dua khuyen tai di.

en: It's something now, anything! No, I will not cave. Yeah, I'm with Mon. Alright, alright.
ja: 私は屈しないわ。そうよ、ママに賛成。
zhTW: 不，我不會屈服的。對，我跟媽站同一邊。
vi: Khong, toi khong chiu dau. Dung, toi ung ho me.

en: You know how you say I never seize the day? Well, alright, even though he's your super,
vi: Du ong ay la nguoi quan ly toa nha.

en: I'm seizing. Mr. Trigger, here is 50 bucks. Merry Christmas. Oh, wow! I didn't get you
ja: トリガーさんを捕まえるわ。はい50ドル。
zhTW: 我要抓住Treeger先生。這裡是50塊。
vi: Toi se tom Treeger. Day la 50 do.
